s2.ptxt: Install the front spring bumper to the piston rod.
Install the front coil spring lower insulator onto the front shock absorber.

atten3.ptxt: Align the 2 protrusions of the front coil spring lower insulator and the 2 holes in the front shock absorber.

s2.ptxt: Using SST, compress the front coil spring.

atten3.ptxt: Do not use an impact wrench.

atten4.ptxt: If the front coil spring is compressed at an angle, using 2 SST will make the work easier.

s2.ptxt: Install the front coil spring to the front shock absorber.

atten3.ptxt: The smaller diameter end of the front coil spring must face upward.

atten4.ptxt: Fit the lower end of the front coil spring into the gap of the insulator.

s2.ptxt: Install the front coil spring upper insulator as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Any misalignment between the front shock absorber lower bracket and the matchmark must be +-5°.

s2.ptxt: Install the front coil spring upper seat with the mark facing to the outside of the vehicle.

atten4.ptxt: Any misalignment between the front shock absorber lower bracket and the matchmark must be +-5°.

s2.ptxt: Install a new front suspension support bearing as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: If there is foreign matter inside the front suspension support bearing, replace it with a new one.

s2.ptxt: Install the front suspension support sub-assembly.
Temporarily tighten a new lock nut.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the flats on the piston rod and the flats on the front suspension support sub-assembly are aligned.

s2.ptxt: Remove the SST slowly in order to release the coil spring.

atten3.ptxt: Do not use an impact wrench.

atten4.ptxt: Any misalignment between the front shock absorber lower bracket and the arrows must be +-5°.
